name: qaira-for-jira
description: Qaira exact frontend converted to a Jira Cloud Forge addon with Jira-native persistence and no external or Forge business database.

scripts.verify:backend: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/qairaAccess.js && node --check src/qairaApi.js && node --check src/qairaSchema.js && bash admin/validate-qaira-schema.sh && npm test
scripts.verify: npm run verify:backend && npm run verify:frontend
scripts.deploy:development: npm run verify && npm run build && forge deploy -e development
